about.title: About me
about.description1: I'm Marta, a Medior Frontend Developer building web applications with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. I create responsive, interactive interfaces and enjoy working on projects where I can contribute meaningfully while continuing to learn and grow.
about.description2: I have hands-on experience with modern frontend workflows, from component design to API integration, and I'm always looking for opportunities to refine my craft.

certificates.title: Certificates
items: First Certificate in English, University of Cambridge

email.title: Let's Connect
email.message: I'm currently looking for new opportunities, my inbox is always open. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!

8.title: Notes App
8.description: A React + TypeScript notes application with magic link authentication and Supabase database. Features a block-based editor supporting text, headings, lists, images, and nested pages with drag-and-drop reordering.

7.title: Prospector
7.description: Business intelligence platform built with Next.js and TypeScript, helping businesses find ideal customers across 11M companies in Central Europe. Features advanced market segmentation, detailed company profiles, and real-time opportunity tracking.

6.title: Sofian Eshop
6.description: One of several projects as part of Sherwood Digital (and only public project, but now also no longer available).

5.title: Socialbakers Website
5.description: The website of the Socialbakers company with CMS. We were transforming existing Socialbakers website from PHP to Next.js. Not available anymore.

4.title: Socialbakers Careers
4.description: Careers website for Socialbakers. Standalone website with list of all open positions. Can be filtered by Location or Department, connected to Greenhouse. Not available anymore.

3.title: Robotfriends
3.description: This application generates a list of users from an API. The features include filtering users, search box, scroll bar, loading time and error boundary message.

2.title: Trillo
2.description: Static HTML page with layout done with flexbox - no functionality. In this project I learned not just flexbox but also working with Sass preprocessor, custom CSS properties, media queries, masks and SVG.

1.title: Simple ToDo list
1.description: jQuery based ToDo app that allows user to add, remove and check/uncheck tasks spiced with little CSS animations and effects.

0.title: RGB Game
0.description: Nice little app for training RGB skills. Build with HTML, bit of CSS and JavaScript. I practiced DOM manipulation and event handling.
